name: devbrother-skills
description: DevBrother agent skills for clarifying requirements, generating AGENTS.md governance systems, and verifying-then-applying PR review feedback.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for clearer AI agent work, project rules, and PR review handling.
interface.longDescription: A small collection of DevBrother agent skills. deep-interview clarifies goals, scope, constraints, and done criteria before implementation. agents-md generates an AGENTS.md governance system and links CLAUDE.md for Claude Code compatibility. autofix fetches unresolved PR review threads from any reviewer (CodeRabbit, Codex cloud review, humans), verifies each comment against the actual code, and applies only validated fixes with approval or in --auto mode.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-interview to clarify this rough idea.
Generate AGENTS.md project rules with agents-md.
Set up agent governance for this repository.
Verify and apply PR review comments with autofix.
